scripts.predeploy: npm run build && npm run export
scripts.deploy: cd out && git init && git config http.postBuffer 524288000 && git checkout -b gh-pages && git add -A && git -c user.name='Deploy Bot' -c user.email='deploy@bot.com' commit -m 'Deploy' && git push -f https://github.com/vishaljha2121/VishalJhaPortfolio.git gh-pages
